method: Classical decomposition: 24h moving average (trend) + daily average pattern (seasonal)

components.trend: 24h moving average — slight upward drift over 7 days
components.seasonal_daily: Clear daily peak at hours 09:00-11:00 and 14:00-16:00 (business hours)
components.seasonal_weekly: Friday shows ~5-8% higher peak than Tuesday (consistent with client workload profile)
components.residual: Anomalies are isolated here — deviations from combined trend and seasonality

holiday_note: Holiday patterns (e.g., Black Friday, Lunar New Year) require 1+ year of historical data. Categorized as Out of Scope for current phase. Logged in ADR for future work.
